title: [Doc Audit][REPO-045] Add docs/ structure for edgar-change-interpreter
description:
## Context

Repo doc audit on 2026-05-08 found a documentation gap in REPO-045 (edgar-change-interpreter).

- Repo family: shared_tooling
- Lifecycle: active
- Exposure: public
- Local path: /Users/zacharyruiz/Source/cmdrvl/edgar-change-interpreter
- Gap tier: 3

## Why this matters

The repo family shared_tooling is complex enough to need docs beyond README, but no root docs/ directory exists.

## What to change

Add docs/ with at least an index plus architecture, operations, or data-contract notes appropriate for the repo family. Link it from README and AGENTS.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Documentation change lands in the appropriate root file or docs/ path.
- [ ] README.md and AGENTS.md link to any new supporting docs where relevant.
- [ ] Commands, paths, and status statements are verified against the current repo.
- [ ] Any examples are copy-pasteable for the repo's actual toolchain.
- [ ] `br dep cycles` remains empty after the bead is synced.

## Verification

- Re-run the repo-doc-audit checks for README.md, AGENTS.md, agent-specific docs, PLAN*.md, and docs/.
- For README changes, verify the README required dimensions: hero, problem/solution, quickstart, and usage.
- For AGENTS changes, verify required dimensions: safety, repo role, build/test/lint commands, coordination, tool guidance, and session protocol.

## Why this matters

Missing CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, CODEX.md leaves harness-specific permissions, hooks, model usage, and local caveats undocumented.

title: [Doc Audit][REPO-045] Add AGENTS.md for agent-safe work in edgar-change-interpreter
description:
## Context

Repo doc audit on 2026-05-08 found a documentation gap in REPO-045 (edgar-change-interpreter).

- Repo family: shared_tooling
- Lifecycle: active
- Exposure: public
- Local path: /Users/zacharyruiz/Source/cmdrvl/edgar-change-interpreter
- Gap tier: 1

## Why this matters

Every CMD+RVL repo needs AGENTS.md. Without it, agents lack safety rules, repo boundaries, exact verification commands, coordination workflow, and session closeout protocol.

## What to change

Add an AGENTS.md based on the CMD+RVL template with safety rules, repo role, toolchain, project structure, build/test/lint commands, CI notes, Beads/Agent Mail coordination, tool guidance, and session protocol.

## Acceptance criteria

- For AGENTS changes, verify required dimensions: safety, repo role, build/test/lint commands, coordination, tool guidance, and session protocol.

title: [Doc Audit][REPO-045] Add active development plan index for edgar-change-interpreter
